visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind other objects.
A large yellow lemon sitting in the front and center of the table, blocking other items.
A green Sprite soda can to the left of the water bottle.
A red Coca-Cola soda can to the right of the water bottle.
A brown paper bag is standing in the background behind all the items.

action_plan.explanation: The yellow lemon is the closest object and must be removed first to access the objects behind it.
The green soda can is blocking the left side of the water bottle and needs to be cleared.
The red soda can is blocking the right side of the water bottle and needs to be cleared.
All obstructing items have been removed, making the water bottle accessible.
